---
title: "Preprocessing Three"
author: "Christopher"
date: "2026-02-28"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}
df_new_ratings <- read_csv("data/new_ratings.csv")
df_new_freq <- read.csv("data/new_freq.csv", sep = ";")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df_new_ratings <- df_new_ratings %>% select(trial_nr, word, word_no_punct, surprisal_2_words_context, entropy_2_words_context)

df_new_ratings$num <- seq(from = 1, to = 3000)
df_new_freq$num <- seq(from = 1, to = 3000)

df_combined <- df_new_ratings %>% left_join(df_new_freq, by = "num")

df_combined <- df_combined %>% select(trial_nr, text_nr, word_no_punct, surprisal_2_words_context, entropy_2_words_context, frequency, zipf_frequency)

df_combined <- df_combined %>% slice(1:2700)

df_clean <- df_clean %>% left_join(df_combined, by = c("text_nr", "trial_nr"))
df_clean <- df_clean %>% select(-surprisal_2, -entropy_2)
```
